name: Bento Grid
description: CSS Grid layout with staggered scale-in entrance animation on scroll-into-view and per-cell 3D tilt hover effect.
accessibility_notes: tilt effect is decorative — content remains accessible

items.description: Array of { content: ReactNode, colSpan?: number, rowSpan?: number }

gap.description: Gap between grid cells in pixels

className.description: CSS class for the grid container

conflicts: tilt effect uses will-change:transform on each cell — many cells may cause compositing overhead
usage_tip: Best for feature showcase grids; avoid with more than 12 cells on mobile.
